prompt: Docker 입문 강의 슬라이드를 만들어야 해. 컨테이너 vs VM 비교, Dockerfile 기본 문법, docker-compose 소개를 다루는 15장 정도의 slides.md를 작성해줘. 코드 블록에 하이라이트도 넣고 v-click 애니메이션도 활용해줘.

assertions.name: valid-slidev-frontmatter
assertions.description: slides.md starts with valid YAML headmatter (theme, title)
assertions.check: file starts with --- and contains theme: and title:

assertions.name: slide-count-target
assertions.check: count of --- slide separators is between 12 and 18

assertions.name: code-highlighting
assertions.description: Uses Slidev code highlighting syntax like {2,3} or {1|2-3}
assertions.check: contains code blocks with curly brace line highlighting

assertions.name: v-click-usage
assertions.description: Uses v-click or v-clicks for progressive reveal

assertions.name: layout-variety
assertions.description: Uses multiple layout types (not just default)
assertions.check: contains at least 2 different layout: values

assertions.name: canvas-overflow-safety
assertions.description: No single slide has more than 6 bullet points or 15 lines of code
assertions.check: no slide between --- separators has excessive content

assertions.name: unocss-classes
assertions.description: Uses UnoCSS/Tailwind utility classes for styling
assertions.check: contains class names like text-xl, bg-, rounded, font-bold etc.
